name: USS Harry F. Bauer (DM 26)
events: 28 Nov 1944 USS Harry F. Bauer departed from Norfolk bound for the Pacific.
12 Dec 1944 USS Harry F. Bauer arrived at San Diego.
27 Jan 1945 USS Harry F. Bauer departed from Pearl Harbor bound for the Iwo Jima area.
8 Mar 1945 USS Harry F. Bauer arrived at Ulithi.
25 Mar 1945 USS Harry F. Bauer arrived in the Okinawa area.

6 Jun 1945 USS Harry F. Bauer is damaged by a Japanese kamikaze aircraft of Okinawa in position 26°14'N, 128°01'E. USS Harry F. Bauer proceeded to Kerama Retto. Full repairs were made at Leyte, Philippines.
